correction.abandonment_rule: If bounded reap cannot release a live leader, abandon all signalling authority and return a cleanup error.
correction.different_uid_residual: EPERM does not prove cleanup of a different-UID group member.
correction.eperm_rule: Accept EPERM only on Darwin when the leader exited before cleanup and both capture pipes reached EOF before cleanup.
correction.esrch_rule: Treat ESRCH as an absent owned group.
correction.group_rule: Signal the owned group before the direct child is reaped.
correction.identity_rule: Keep the direct child unreaped until the final group signal.
correction.other_error_rule: Fail closed for every other signal error.
correction.signal_rule: Do not send a process-group signal after reap.

unsafe_order: The runner reaps the direct child.
The kernel can reuse the released number.
The runner sends a signal to that number as a process-group ID.

repair_subject: release: repair bounded process-group identity handling
